name: Thai Grilled Chicken - Midsummer Thai Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon chinese chili sauce (or 1 chili flakes)
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
Tart Sweet Dipping Sauce
1. Sugar: 1 cup
2. Water: 0.5 cups
3. White vinegar: 0.5 cups
4. Garlic: 2 tablespoons, chopped
5. Fish sauce: 2 tablespoons
6. Chinese chili sauce: 1.5 teaspoons
7. Lime juice: 0.25 cups, shredded carrot
Combine coriander, chili sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, garlic, and sugar in a blender or mix by hand. Marinate the chicken for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Preheat broiler or barbecue. Broil chicken skin side down for 4 minutes, then turn and broil another 4 minutes until crispy and cooked through. Cut into half-inch strips.
Place lettuce leaves on a platter and arrange chicken on top. Garnish with coriander, mint sprigs, and sliced green onions.
To eat in the Thai style, roll chicken in lettuce leaves along with herbs and onions. Dip into the dipping sauce. Alternatively, serve lettuce, chicken, and garnishes together.
